name: Tagove
description: Developer of a multi-channel customer communication platform designed to transform the way companies connect with online customers. The company's platform provides live chat software that provides video chat, voice calling and text chat services with co-browsing and screen sharing facilities, enabling clients to communicate face-to-face with customers thus improving their performance and driving long-lasting customer engagement.

name: Aella Credit
description: Developer of a diversified credit payments platform intended to offer a raft of financial services to underbanked users with a focus on lending. The company's debt-as-a-service model ensures that agents can have quick and easy access to funding through its partnerships with agency banks across the continent, enabling low-income underbanked households to have access to cash at competitive rates anytime.

name: Aumet
description: Developer of a B2B healthcare platform designed to support healthcare providers with their business decisions and performance. The company's platform aims to promote healthcare companies acquire the products and services on the market, and access essential information for critical business decisions, enabling clients to bridge the gaps in the healthcare industry by digitalizing the ordering process between, suppliers and healthcare providers.

name: Balloon
description: Developer of an insight mobility platform intended to solve the systemic issues that hold back teams and drive them to true growth. The company's platform levels the playing field and removes costly cognitive biases like groupthink, gender bias, and anchoring from collaboration, decision-making, and innovation, enabling companies to identify priorities, reach decisions and define decisions that streamline workflows, allowing clients to lead to fewer meetings and productive results.

name: Hykso
description: Developer of a wearable motion tracker designed to monitor and view a fighter's punch output in real-time. The company's tracker tracks a hand's movement several times per second to detect the number, type, and velocity of all the punches, and its application permits measuring daily, weekly, and monthly progression, enabling fighters to compare their speed, punch count, and intensity compared to other fighters to better know their strengths and weaknesses.

name: Flye
description: Developer of a marketing platform designed to connect brands and businesses with their audience. The company's platform uses geo-fencing and audience analysis to provide digital strategies with on-brand messaging, enabling clients to understand their audiences and maximize the reach of their campaigns.

name: Gas POS
description: Developer of an EMV-compliant point-of-sale system designed to assist with the transition to EMV upgrades at the pump. The company's system provides payment security and point-to-point encryption to protect from fraud, hacking and fines, enabling gas station owners to avail fuel control and fleet card acceptance by upgrading to EMV-chip reading pumps and running fuel business conveniently with reduced frauds and costs.

name: iControl
description: Developer of a cloud-based application designed for construction management. The company designs and develops a mobile application for construction collaboration and documentation, it helps to replace paper reports with a mobile app at construction sites, enabling site personnel to create and share all project documentation created during production.

name: InnerSpace
description: Developer of an indoor mapping and location intelligence platform designed to improve the usage of indoor space. The company's platform gives insight into how people use their space which drives revenue and improves operations in their smart buildings, enabling businesses to access data to action and utilize indoor spaces more efficiently.

name: MojiLala
description: Developer of an augmented reality application designed for video creation with augmented reality characters. The company's software offers unique and creative AR objects that can be embedded in videos and then shared on various social media platforms, enabling users to express themselves and bring life to the environment around them.

name: Mashvisor
description: Developer of investment analytics software designed to identify secure investment market potentials for traditional and short-term lodging properties. The company's platform delivers neighborhood data and analytics such as cash flow, cash on cash return, cap rate, GRM, vacancy rates and rental market strength indicators as well as provides aggregate real estate investment data, enabling clients to make profitable real estate investments and rental strategy decisions.

name: myfavorito
description: Developer of a fan-empowered sponsorship platform intended to transform fan love into real money, so everyone wins. The company creates the playing field for sports with a radically different approach to sponsorship, enabling brands and companies that never previously engaged with sports will support thousands of sports clubs simultaneously.

name: OWLR
description: Developer of a universal smart home platform designed to make complex home security cameras safer and easier to use. The company's platform provides a free mobile application used for home security and network cameras, enabling users to monitor and control their homes anywhere.

name: Parting
description: Operator of a funeral house marketplace intended to find and compare local funeral services. The company's platform has an inbuilt searchable database to find and compare local funeral homes, read reviews, view photographs, find locations, and compare prices offered by other funeral service providers, enabling users to find and book funeral homes, save money and avoid time lagging hassles during cremation.

name: Pluto AI
description: Developer of an operational data platform designed to empower operators to automate performance monitoring for any industrial workflow. The company's platform makes businesses drive return on investment by reducing resource consumption and operating costs and also provides data-driven operations by moving insights and AI from the back office to front-line operators, managers, and executives, enabling operators to automatically monitor the performance of critical processes and have access to actionable information.

name: Scopio, Scopio LLC
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-based user-generated content platform designed to find and license images and videos from social media. The company's platform streamlines the copyright process for user-generated images and videos on social media, enabling users to seamlessly search, license, publish and pull insights from user-generated images and videos.

name: ShearShare
description: Developer of a business-to-business mobile platform designed to increase empty salon chairs on demand. The company's platform matches salon and barbershop owners with licensed beauty professionals, enabling stylists to find and book working spaces for rent.

name: Snout
description: Developer of a digital check-in application designed to improve the pet parents' experience at veterinary practices. The company's application offers financial options, manages medical records across locations, and streamlines veterinary hospital workflow, enabling pet parents and veterinarians to refocus on what matters most, giving pets the care they need and deserve.

name: Gluwa
description: Gluwa is a builder of Gluwa, Creditcoin, and a stealth protocol. Gluwa connects DeFi investors to TradFi investment opportunities. Creditcoin is an interoperable credit network that powers Gluwa. The stealth protocol provides trustless proof-of-location, which enhances the security and usability of Gluwa.

name: Homigo
description: Provider of home services platform intended to help users take care of all their home maintenance and repairs. The company's platform offers concierge service for managing home maintenance such as plumbing, landscaping, pools, exterior, broken appliances, handyman, HVAC, masonry, roofing and electrical wiring repair, enabling users to avail a one point of contact for home maintenance & repair needs.

name: Gestoos
description: Provider of an artificial intelligence based software platform designed to revolutionize the way humans interact with technology. The company's platform enables cameras and sensors to see, understand, and respond to human movement and behavior in any environment or context, providing enterprises with precision tracking of any shape, object and motion.

name: Crema
description: Developer of an online platform to provide coffee subscription services. The company operates a marketplace enabling coffee drinkers to subscribe to top coffees from craft roasters.

name: Bstow
description: Developer of a micro-donation application. The company develops an application which rounds-up any transactions made by the user and automatically donates the money to a pre-selected charity.
